name_en: 🆕【Exclusive Real Shot M80755 Black Leopard Print】The Wild at Heart series special edition Rosalie coin purse infuses Monogram canvas with animal print inspiration. It opens with a Louis Vuitton signature engraved button on a rounded flap, featuring a zip coin pocket, slip pocket, and card slots.
name_cn:
🆕【Exclusive Real Shot M80755 Black Leopard Print】The Wild at Heart series special edition Rosalie coin purse infuses Monogram canvas with animal print inspiration. It opens with a Louis Vuitton signature engraved button on a rounded flap, featuring a zip coin pocket, slip pocket, and card slots.
Detailed Features 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
